eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Wheeler, OR; at 6:04 PM on JUL 22, 2026 Effective until 10:04 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
Level 3 - GO NOW - Evacuate immediately from Zone WHH-072-A, South of Hwy 26, parts of Gable Cr, Thompson Creek, and NW Branch Rd.. 
Nivel 3 - VAYASE AHORA - Evacue inmediatamente de Zone WHH-072-A, South of Hwy 26, parts of Gable Cr, Thompson Creek, and NW Branch Rd..
